data.title: Rockfire Resources Expands Share Capital with Warrant Exercise
data.description:
Rockfire Resources PLC ( (GB:ROCK) ) has shared an announcement.

Rockfire Resources PLC has announced the exercise of 30,000,000 warrants, resulting in the issuance of new ordinary shares valued at £30,000. This move will increase the company’s total voting rights and share capital to over 6.16 billion shares, potentially impacting shareholder notifications under FCA rules.

More about Rockfire Resources PLC

Rockfire Resources PLC is an exploration company focused on base metals, critical minerals, and precious metals. The company is engaged in identifying and developing mineral resources, with a market focus on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 105,895,842

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £15.39M

data.title: First Mining Gold Reports Promising Drilling Results at Duparquet Project
data.description:
First Mining Gold ( (TSE:FF) ) has provided an update.

First Mining Gold Corp. has announced positive drilling results from its 2025 program at the Duparquet Gold Project, particularly at the newly discovered Miroir target. The drilling has revealed significant near-surface gold mineralization, with notable intercepts including 3.23 g/t Au over 25.9 meters. These results extend the mineralization to a depth of 100 meters and highlight the potential for resource growth in this underexplored area. The ongoing exploration success at Miroir, along with other targets, positions the company to potentially expand its resource base and enhance its development scenarios.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FF) stock is a Buy with a C$0.45 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on First Mining Gold stock, see the TSE:FF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:FF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:FF is a Neutral.

First Mining Gold’s overall score reflects its status as a development-stage mining company. The robust balance sheet and positive corporate events are significant strengths, while the lack of revenue and profitability remain key concerns. Technical analysis shows positive momentum but suggests caution due to overbought conditions. Overall, the company’s future potential is tied to its successful transition from exploration to production.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:FF stock, click here.

More about First Mining Gold

First Mining Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold resources. The company is actively engaged in advancing its projects in the Abitibi region of Quebec, Canada, with a particular emphasis on the Duparquet Gold Project.

Average Trading Volume: 2,044,077

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$383.5M

data.title: Exchange Income Corporation Expands Indigenous Pilot Training Program
data.description:
Exchange Income ( (TSE:EIF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Exchange Income Corporation (EIC) has successfully completed the fourth season of its Atik Mason Indigenous Pilot Pathway, a program designed to train Indigenous pilots, in Thompson, Manitoba. The program, supported by Manitoba Keewatinowi Okimakank Inc. and the Government of Nunavut, has expanded its operations to Rankin Inlet, Nunavut, and has celebrated its first graduate from this base. EIC has offered employment to several graduates, including the first Nunavut graduate, Nujaliah Iyerak, who will work with EIC subsidiary Keewatin Air. The initiative aims to increase Indigenous representation among pilots and invest in Inuit communities, aligning with the Truth and Reconciliation Commission of Canada’s Calls to Action.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:EIF) stock is a Buy with a C$81.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Exchange Income stock, see the TSE:EIF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:EIF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:EIF is a Outperform.

Exchange Income’s strong technical momentum and positive earnings call outlook are the primary drivers of its score. While financial performance shows growth, high leverage and cash flow issues are concerns. The stock’s valuation is relatively high, but the dividend yield offers some compensation.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:EIF stock, click here.

More about Exchange Income

Exchange Income Corporation is a diversified, acquisition-oriented company focused on the aerospace, aviation, and manufacturing sectors. It employs a disciplined acquisition strategy to identify profitable, well-established companies with strong management teams, steady cash flow, niche market operations, and opportunities for organic growth.

Average Trading Volume: 137,015

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3.75B

data.title: RH Petrogas Limited Announces Board and Committee Changes
data.description:
RH Petrogas Limited ( (SG:T13) ) has provided an announcement.

RH Petrogas Limited has announced a change in its Board and Board Committees, effective from October 1, 2025. Ms. Caroline Lee has been appointed as an Independent Director and will join the Audit, Nominating, and Remuneration Committees. This move is part of the company’s ongoing efforts to comply with the Code of Corporate Governance 2018, indicating a commitment to strengthening its governance framework and enhancing its industry positioning.

More about RH Petrogas Limited

RH Petrogas Limited operates in the energy sector, primarily focusing on oil and gas exploration and production. The company is engaged in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas resources, with a market focus on expanding its operations and maintaining compliance with corporate governance standards.

data.title: ENN Energy Updates Securities Amid Privatization Proposal
data.description:
ENN Energy Holdings ( (HK:2688) ) has shared an announcement.

ENN Energy Holdings Limited announced an update on its securities, revealing the exercise of 1,000 share options under its 2012 Share Option Scheme, bringing the total issued shares to 1,131,254,275. The announcement is part of a broader privatization proposal, which involves a scheme of arrangement under the Cayman Islands Companies Act. Stakeholders are advised to exercise caution as the proposal’s implementation is contingent on certain pre-conditions and conditions being met.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2688) stock is a Hold with a HK$64.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ENN Energy Holdings stock, see the HK:2688 Stock Forecast page.

More about ENN Energy Holdings

ENN Energy Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in the energy sector. It focuses on providing natural gas services and is involved in the privatization proposal by ENN Natural Gas Co., Ltd. and Xinneng (Hong Kong) Energy Investment Limited.

Average Trading Volume: 3,401,597

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$71.95B

data.title: Eni S.p.A. Advances Share Buyback Program with Recent Purchase
data.description:
ENI S.p.A. ( (IT:ENI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Eni S.p.A. announced the purchase of 537,858 of its own shares on September 15, 2025, as part of its ongoing buyback program. This transaction, valued at approximately 8 million euros, reflects Eni’s strategic initiative to manage its share capital and enhance shareholder value, holding now 4.72% of its share capital in treasury shares.

data.title: CARsgen Therapeutics Announces Board Composition and Roles
data.description:
The latest update is out from CARsgen Therapeutics Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:2171) ).

The board includes executive, non-executive, and independent non-executive directors, with specific members assigned to the audit, remuneration, and nomination and corporate governance committees. data.title: BlueNord ASA Secures Approval for Bond Listing on Euronext Oslo Børs
data.description:
Norwegian Energy Company ASA ( (GB:0HTF) ) has provided an announcement.

BlueNord ASA has announced the approval of a listing prospectus by the Financial Supervisory Authority of Norway for its new USD 300 million subordinated hybrid callable bond issue, set to be listed on Euronext Oslo Børs. This strategic move is expected to enhance BlueNord’s financial flexibility and strengthen its position in the energy sector, potentially benefiting stakeholders through improved market access and investment opportunities.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0HTF) stock is a Buy with a NOK681.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Norwegian Energy Company ASA stock, see the GB:0HTF Stock Forecast page.

More about Norwegian Energy Company ASA

BlueNord ASA is a European oil and gas company focused on producing and developing energy resources, as well as supporting the energy transition. The company holds a significant stake in the Danish Underground Consortium, which manages oil and gas production in the Danish North Sea. BlueNord is publicly traded on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker ‘BNOR’.

Average Trading Volume: 48,481

Current Market Cap: NOK11.94B
